        exact hm
    calc (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
        _ ≤ (Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).map (·.factorization p)).sum := hsub
        _ ≤ (Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).map fun m ↦ if p ∣ m then 1 else 0).sum := by
            apply Multiset.sum_le_sum_of_nonneg
            intro m hm
            have h2 := hval m hm
            simp only [if_pos h2] at *
            all_goals omega
        _ = P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card := by
            simp only [Multiset.map_join, sum_join, map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul,
              Multiset.Ico, card_filter, sum_eq_multiset_sum]
  have h2 : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) = P.n / p := by
    have h1 : p.Prime := hprime
    have h2 : p > Real.sqrt P.n := by exact_mod_cast hp'
    have h3 : p > P.n / p := by
      have h4 : (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hp'
      have h5 : (Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ)) ^ 2 > (P.n / p : ℝ) * (p : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg (P.n : ℝ), Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n by exact_mod_cast (show 0 ≤ P.n by linarith)), sq_pos_of_pos (show (0 : ℝ) < p by exact_mod_cast show 0 < p by linarith)]
      have h6 : (P.n : ℝ) > (P.n / p : ℝ) * (p : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg (P.n : ℝ), Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n by exact_mod_cast (show 0 ≤ P.n by linarith)), sq_pos_of_pos (show (0 : ℝ) < p by exact_mod_cast show 0 < p by linarith)]
      have h7 : (p : ℝ) > (P.n / p : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith [sq_pos_of_pos (show (0 : ℝ) < p by exact_mod_cast show 0 < p by linarith)]
      exact_mod_cast h7
    rw [factorization_def]
    · have := Fact.mk h1; rw [padicValNat_factorial]; simp_all
    · exact h1
  have h3 : P.initial.balance p ≥ -↑(P.M) := by
    simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, h2]
    omega
  exact h3

have h1 : P.initial.factorization p = P.n / p := by
    have hp'': (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by
      simpa using hp'
    have h2 : P.initial.factorization p = P.n / p := by
      apply P.initial.factorial_factorization_eq_div
      exact hp''
    exact h2
  have h2 : (P.initial.factorization p : ℝ) = (P.n / p : ℝ) := by
    exact_mod_cast h1
  have h3 : P.initial.balance p = 0 := by
    simp only [P.initial.balance, P.initial.factorization, Finset.sum_eq_zero, sub_self, h2]
  have h4 : (P.M : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
    exact_mod_cast show (0 : ℕ) ≤ P.M by omega
  linarith [h3, h4]

have h1 : P.initial.balance p = (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum := by
    simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum ≥ 0 := by
    apply Multiset.sum_nonneg
    intro x hx
    simp at hx ⊢
    have h3 : x.factorization p ≥ 0 := by
      apply Nat.cast_nonneg
    exact_mod_cast h3
  by_cases hM_zero : P.M = 0
  · -- If M = 0, then we need to show sum ≥ 0, which is true
    rw [hM_zero]
    norm_num at *
    all_goals linarith
  · -- M > 0
    have hM_pos : P.M > 0 := by
      omega
    have hM_pos_nat : (P.M : ℝ) > 0 := by
      exact_mod_cast hM_pos
    linarith
